What
I corrected the spell of FlashInfer on a comment and a log message as follows;

use_falshinfer -> use_flashinfer
FalshInfer -> FlashInfer

vllm.title: [V1] Implement Cascade Attention
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements a simple version of Cascade Attention. Cascade attention can save the HBM bandwidth for reading KV cache when requests share the same prefix.
NOTE: For simplicity, this PR only uses cascade attention when every running request shares the same KV cache. If one or more requests do n

vllm.title: [VLM] Move supported limits and max tokens to merged multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR moves the following code to merged multi-modal processor to enable checking the consistency between those two:

Maximum number of placeholder tokens per item (originally in multi-modal registry)
Maximum number of supported items (originally in multi-modal data parser)
